default_error.title: Unexpected Error
default_error.text: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

error_info.title: Page Not Found
error_info.text: The resource you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

error_info.title: Access Denied
error_info.text: You do not have the necessary permissions to view this sector.

error_info.title: Bad Request
error_info.text: Direct access to template files is strictly prohibited.
